Branch: codex/custom-workflow-claimability
Commit: 42dd78e9
Checks: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build
Verification: real Maestro evaluate gates now derive claimability from profile queue/owner metadata; e.g. maestro-2123 is agent-claimable in ready_to_evaluate and maestro-ea79 is non-claimable in evaluating.
